message:
refactor(cli): improve CLI infrastructure and benchmarks

CLI modules:
- args.rs: Better argument parsing
- completion.rs: Shell completion improvements
- error.rs: Enhanced error handling
- exit.rs: Better exit code management
- mod.rs: Updated module organization
- output.rs: Improved output formatting
- progress.rs: Better progress indicators
- signal.rs: CLI signal handling

Benchmarks:
- tracing_overhead.rs: Updated tracing benchmarks

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
